name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-11
title: Promote /rabbit-config to a proper skill and add human-approval bypass subcommand
description:
/rabbit-config is listed in the system prompt skill list but has no SKILL.md backing file — it is a stub. The command file exists (commands/rabbit-config.md) and the implementation scripts exist (rabbit-config.py), but the skill is not surfaced as an invocable Skill tool entry with a proper SKILL.md, so agents cannot discover or invoke it correctly.

Additionally, /rabbit-config is missing a subcommand for human-approval bypass — a configuration concern that currently has no durable state at all (conversation-memory only, which is fragile and not auditable).

This backlog covers three related gaps:

1. Implement /rabbit-config as a proper skill with SKILL.md (via skill-creator) so it is surfaced in the skill list and agents can invoke it as Skill("rabbit-config", ...). The SKILL.md must document all existing subcommands: prompt-threshold, allowed-tools, bash-allow, and the new human-approval subcommand below.

2. Add /rabbit-config human-approval subcommand:
   - /rabbit-config human-approval bypass   — writes .rabbit-human-approval-bypass (gitignored) with content "session". rabbit-feature-touch dispatcher reads this file; if present, passes --no-human-approval to dispatch-tdd-subagent.py and emits a visible warning.
   - /rabbit-config human-approval restore  — deletes .rabbit-human-approval-bypass.
   - /rabbit-config human-approval          — prints current state (active/inactive).
   sync-check.py emits a red [rabbit] alert on every Stop while .rabbit-human-approval-bypass is present: "[rabbit] HUMAN APPROVAL BYPASS ACTIVE — Step 4 skipped for all dispatches".

3. Supersedes RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-4 (/rabbit-config subcommand list unification) — that item's intent (list all subcommands consistently) is subsumed by the SKILL.md authoring in item 1 above.

Owner: rabbit-cage (settings/config surface).

history.note: TDD cycle complete. /rabbit-config promoted to skill (skills/rabbit-config/SKILL.md + scripts/rabbit-config.py); command file shrunk to thin shim. New human-approval [bypass|gated] subcommand backed by .rabbit-human-approval-bypass marker; sync-check.py alert at priority 4. Full CLI surfaced in SKILL.md for dispatcher discovery. .gitignore updated. 39 test suites pass.
